Uses of Class
neqsim.process.util.utilitydesign.UtilityCompressionOptimizer

Packages that use UtilityCompressionOptimizer
Package
Description
neqsim.process.util.utilitydesign
 

  • Uses of UtilityCompressionOptimizer in neqsim.process.util.utilitydesign

    Methods in neqsim.process.util.utilitydesign that return UtilityCompressionOptimizer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    UtilityCompressionOptimizer
    UtilityCompressionOptimizer.optimize()
    Builds the two-stage compression flowsheet and runs the agentic optimizer to minimize total shaft power over the interstage pressure.
    UtilityCompressionOptimizer
    UtilityCompressionOptimizer.setDeliveryPressureBara(double deliveryPressureBara)
    Sets the delivery (final) pressure.
    UtilityCompressionOptimizer
    UtilityCompressionOptimizer.setFlowRateKgh(double flowRateKgh)
    Sets the utility-gas mass flow.
    UtilityCompressionOptimizer
    UtilityCompressionOptimizer.setFluid(SystemInterface fluid)
    Supplies a custom utility-gas fluid; when not set a default dry-air fluid is used.
    UtilityCompressionOptimizer
    UtilityCompressionOptimizer.setInletPressureBara(double inletPressureBara)
    Sets the compressor suction pressure.
    UtilityCompressionOptimizer
    UtilityCompressionOptimizer.setInletTempC(double inletTempC)
    Sets the feed temperature.
    UtilityCompressionOptimizer
    UtilityCompressionOptimizer.setIntercoolerTempC(double intercoolerTempC)
    Sets the intercooler outlet temperature.
    UtilityCompressionOptimizer
    UtilityCompressionOptimizer.setMaxEvaluations(int maxEvaluations)
    Sets the optimizer evaluation budget.
    UtilityCompressionOptimizer
    UtilityCompressionOptimizer.setSeed(long seed)
    Sets the deterministic optimizer seed.
